name: paid-saas-first-ads
prompt: I want to start running ads for my $49/mo project-management SaaS. Where do I begin?
expected_output: Grounds the start in target CPA from unit economics, conversion tracking + a converting landing page first, channel choice by intent (search captures demand vs social creates it), one channel to start — not 'run Facebook ads'.
assertions: Anchors on a target CPA / unit economics (LTV:CAC) before recommending spend
Flags prerequisites: conversion tracking installed and a landing page that converts, before launching
Chooses a channel by buyer intent (search = capture existing demand vs paid social = create demand)
Recommends starting with one channel/focus rather than several at once
No fabricated benchmark numbers stated as fact; estimates are flagged as estimates
